x-enumeration-literals.name: Market Tracking
x-enumeration-literals.description: Track competitor activity and customer behavioral insights to assess required active customer campaign coverage and goals

x-enumeration-literals.name: Performance Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Assess coverage and performance of the customer campaign portfolio

x-enumeration-literals.name: Campaign Direction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Direct the development/refinement of customer campaigns and initiate campaign execution as appropriate

x-enumeration-literals.name: Competitive Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Market and Competitor Analysis – use market research to identify segment gaps & competitive strengths (in line with Corporate Strategy)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Coverage Planning
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Customer Segmentation – defined by demographics, psychographics, behaviors, etc. matched to services and products
Campaign Objective Attainment – set by segment, defined in terms of brand awareness, new business generation, retention, etc.)
Resource Planning – define and allocate budget, staff, facilities and materials

x-enumeration-literals.name: Impact Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Assess Objective Attainment – by segment (and supporting campaign) – this can trigger an ‘oversight’ response

x-enumeration-literals.name: Capability Oversight
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Design Scheduling
**Direct Campaign Development – by segment/demographics/channel/ product etc.
**Instigate Campaign (re)Design
Execution Scheduling 
**Campaign Scheduling – set schedule and initiate campaign execution 
**Instigate Campaign re(Scheduling)
